title: Floral Chewy Comforting Algerian Khus Khus Crumble
description: A floral, chewy, comforting dish from Algeria featuring khus khus (a type of poppy seed) that combines broiling with dairy-free ingredients for a delightful treat.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine khus khus with coconut milk and fruits. Add cardamom powder and sugar; mix well.
Fold in sunflower oil gently until everything is moist but not overly liquidy.
In another medium-sized mixing bowl, add almond meal and almond extract. Mix evenly to ensure no lumps remain.
Gradually fold the flour mixture into the khus khus mixture while stirring continuously to combine both mixtures without overmixing.
Transfer the crumble mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil on high for 5 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp around the edges. Be careful not to burn as it will only take a minute at most.
Remove from heat immediately after broiling.
